item.title: Synthetic Data Vault (SDV): A Python Library for Dataset Modeling
item.description: A deep dive into code snippets and implementation guides for synthetic data generation for defects using the Synthetic Data Vault library.

item.title: OpenCV AI Competition 2021 Highlights and Team Profiles Part 1
item.description: Showcase of OpenCV industrial inspection implementations and anomaly detection projects from the OpenCV AI competition.

item.title: Extreme Rare Event Classification Using Autoencoders in Keras
item.description: A practical guide on building an Autoencoder anomaly detection code in Keras for rare event classification, relevant for defect detection.

item.title: YOLO: Real-Time object detection explained
item.description: Detailed technical implementation and explanation of YOLO for custom objects and object detection, outlining architecture and code strategies.

item.title: Deploy Custom Object Detection using Flask & Python, Step by Step
item.description: Deploy your own custom YOLO model in localhost.

item.title: Custom Training Pipeline for Object Detection Models
item.description: A practical guide on how to implement a custom training pipeline for object detection models, including YOLO and PyTorch training loops.

item.title: How to Train A Custom Object Detection Model with YOLO v5
item.description: A step-by-step guide on training a custom object detection model using YOLOv5, including data collection, annotation, and model configuration.
